steps.title: Identify the defining signal
steps.content: The passage structure is: negative words are replaced faster [at a certain rate] — [blank] [definition of that rate]. The blank introduces a restatement or clarification of what the technical term “cognate replacement” actually means.

steps.title: Apply the correct transition
steps.content: The transition “that is,” is the standard way to restate or clarify something—perfect for defining what “cognate replacement” means. The other three suggest similarity, addition, or exemplification instead of clarification. That matches choice C — C is correct.
